assertions.title: Warning when list has no tokens for current chain

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/, clear localStorage, reload
steps.expected: Clean app state on Base chain
steps.observed: App loads on Base chain with default tokens

steps.action: Open settings, add Compound tokenlist (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/compound-finance/token-list/master/compound.tokenlist.json)
steps.expected: Compound list loads with Ethereum-only tokens
steps.observed: Compound list added showing '0 tokens' and '0 tokens for Base' warning in amber text

steps.action: Verify chain mismatch warning text
steps.expected: Warning text visible on Compound entry
steps.observed: Compound entry shows '0 tokens' count and '0 tokens for Base' chain mismatch warning

steps.action: With Compound list loaded on Base (showing '0 tokens for Base' warning), switch chain to Ethereum
steps.expected: Warning disappears since Compound has 27 Ethereum tokens
steps.observed: Compound entry now shows '27 tokens' with no chain mismatch warning

steps.action: Switch back to Base
steps.expected: Warning reappears since Compound has 0 Base tokens
steps.observed: Compound entry shows '0 tokens' and '0 tokens for Base' warning again

assertions.title: No false warning when list has tokens for current chain

steps.action: On Ethereum chain, check Default Tokenlist entry in settings
steps.expected: No chain mismatch warning since default list has 357 Ethereum tokens
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist shows '357 tokens' with no warning

steps.action: Check Compound list entry on Ethereum
steps.expected: No chain mismatch warning since Compound has 27 Ethereum tokens
steps.observed: Compound shows '27 tokens' with no warning

steps.action: Switch to Base, check Default Tokenlist
steps.expected: No warning since default list has 87 Base tokens
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist shows '87 tokens' with no warning

assertions.title: Source list name shown for duplicate symbols

steps.action: Add CoinGecko tokenlist (https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json) as custom list on Ethereum
steps.expected: CoinGecko list loads with 5098 tokens
steps.observed: CoinGecko list added showing '5098 tokens'

steps.action: Search 'PEPE' in From Token autocomplete
steps.expected: Multiple PEPE entries from different lists with source badges
steps.observed: PEPE from Default Tokenlist shows 'Default Tokenlist' badge at 0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933. PEPE 'The Original Pepe' shows 'CoinGecko' badge at 0x4dfae3690b93c47470b03036a17b23c1be05127c. PEPE 'NEWPEPE' shows 'CoinGecko' badge at 0xa57ed6e54be8125bbe45d6ca330e45ebb71ef11e. PEPE 'Pepe King Prawn' shows 'CoinGecko' badge at 0x51a59a02ba906194285e81eb1f98ffa28e7cf4c9.

steps.action: Verify full addresses visible per project convention
steps.expected: Full 0x addresses shown, not truncated
steps.observed: All addresses displayed in full (e.g., 0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933)

assertions.title: Correct address used after disambiguated selection

steps.action: From disambiguated PEPE results, click 'PEPE Pepe Default Tokenlist' entry
steps.expected: From Token field populated with correct PEPE address from Default Tokenlist
steps.observed: Field shows 'PEPE (0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933)' and data-address attribute set to 0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933

steps.action: Click Compare Quotes to trigger /compare request
steps.expected: Request uses the selected PEPE address
steps.observed: URL updated to include from=0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933. Network shows GET /compare?chainId=1&from=0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933&to=0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2&amount=1000&slippageBps=50 -> 200

assertions.title: Toggled-off list tokens excluded from autocomplete

steps.action: Open settings and toggle CoinGecko list OFF
steps.expected: CoinGecko toggle switch unchecked, list visually grayed out
steps.observed: CoinGecko switch is unchecked (no [checked] attribute), list appears dimmed

steps.action: Close settings and search 'PEPE' in From Token
steps.expected: Only Default Tokenlist PEPE shown, no CoinGecko PEPE variants
steps.observed: Only one PEPE result: 'PEPE Pepe' at 0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933 from Default Tokenlist. No source badge shown (no disambiguation needed since only one PEPE). CoinGecko's 'The Original Pepe', 'NEWPEPE', and 'Pepe King Prawn' entries are gone.

steps.action: Re-enable CoinGecko list in settings
steps.expected: All three lists (Default, Compound, CoinGecko) enabled
steps.observed: All three lists enabled and checked

steps.action: Search 'USDC' in From Token autocomplete
steps.expected: Only one USDC entry at the canonical address 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48 despite USDC being in Default, Compound, and CoinGecko lists
steps.observed: Exactly one 'USDC USDCoin' entry at 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48. No duplicate USDC entries. No disambiguation badge shown (single address). Compound's cUSDC at different address shows as separate entry (different symbol).

steps.action: Verify deduplication with shared tokens (COMP, DAI, WETH, etc.)
steps.expected: Each shared token appears once
steps.observed: Confirmed via accessibility snapshot: USDC appears exactly once at the canonical address. Other USDC-related tokens (cUSDC, AUSDC, IUSDC, etc.) appear separately since they have different symbols or addresses.

steps.action: Chain switching: switch from Ethereum to Base
steps.expected: Default tokens update to Base addresses
steps.observed: From Token changes to USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913) and To Token changes to WETH (0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006)

steps.action: Quote comparison: USDC→WETH on Ethereum with amount 1000
steps.expected: Comparison results displayed
steps.observed: Spandex (kyberswap/odos) returns 0.4917/0.4912 WETH with gas estimate 0.1756/0.1620 gwei. Results section shows Spandex and Curve tabs. Recommended quote displayed.

steps.action: Slippage presets: click '100' preset then '50' preset
steps.expected: Slippage input updates to match preset
steps.observed: Clicking 100 sets slippage to 100, clicking 50 sets it to 50. Active button state updates correctly.

steps.action: MEV Protection modal: click MEV Protection button
steps.expected: Modal opens with MEV explanation and Flashbots Protect info
steps.observed: Modal opens showing MEV explanation, Ethereum Mainnet section with sandwich attack warning, disabled 'Add Flashbots Protect to Wallet' button (no wallet connected). Flashbots Docs link present.

steps.action: Close MEV modal via Escape key
steps.expected: Modal closes
steps.observed: Modal closes successfully, main UI restored

frictions.description: Auto-refresh timer (15s) interferes with testing by reloading results and changing page state during interactions. Must call clearInterval(window._refreshTimer) after every page navigation or chain switch.
frictions.resolution: Used page.evaluate to clear auto-refresh timer at start of each test sequence

frictions.description: Finding public tokenlists with same-symbol-different-address tokens for disambiguation testing required trial and error. Standard lists (Compound, Aave) all share canonical addresses with the default Uniswap list. Only CoinGecko's 5098-token list contained enough variety (e.g., multiple PEPE tokens) to trigger disambiguation.
frictions.resolution: Used CoinGecko list which has multiple PEPE tokens at different addresses vs Default Tokenlist

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Chain mismatch warnings correctly appear/disappear based on token availability per chain (Compound list shows '0 tokens for Base' warning, no warning on Ethereum). Autocomplete disambiguation shows source list badges when same symbol has different addresses (PEPE from Default vs CoinGecko). Correct address is used in /compare requests after disambiguated selection. Toggled-off list tokens are excluded from autocomplete. Same-address tokens across lists are deduplicated (USDC appears once despite being in 3 lists). All existing functionality (chain switching, quote comparison, slippage presets, MEV modal) works correctly.
